penalties.description: Task was not completed within the maximum time limit of 300 seconds. Not all rings were transferred back to the original side.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows clear peg transfer activity with rings being moved between pegs on opposite sides. The task started when the first ring was touched and continued through outbound transfers to the right side and partial return transfers back to the left side. However, the task was not completed within the time frame shown, as evidenced by the video ending before all rings were returned to their original positions. The incomplete task results in a score of zero according to FLS scoring rules.
